name: Infant-to-Toddler Rocker (Pink)
description: A colourful infant rocker that converts to a toddler seat, with hanging toys and vibration mode.

name: Infant-to-Toddler Rocker (Teal)
description: A teal owl-themed infant rocker with detachable toy bar, music, and vibration.

name: Baby Turban Cap
description: Soft stretch cotton turban caps available in a range of colours, perfect for newborns.

name: Baby Carrier EN71
description: EN71-certified ergonomic baby carrier with padded shoulder straps and adjustable waist belt.

name: Baby Soap Dish
description: Cute bear-design plastic soap dish with lid, available in 4 colours.

name: Baby Spoon 5-Piece Set
description: Infan-Tec BPA-free colourful 5-piece baby spoon set, safe for newborns.

name: Baby Spoon & Fork Set
description: Bebesitos BPA-free soft spoon and fork set, designed for babies 0–3 years.

name: Baby Silicone Spoon Set
description: Kokibebe food-grade silicone spoon set, BPA-free, in 4 pastel colours.

name: Baby Heat Sensing Spoon & Fork Set
description: Heat-sensing BPA-free spoon and fork set that changes colour if food is too hot.

name: Baby Stroller A517
description: Lightweight baby stroller available in black, beige, pink and blue with canopy and cup holder.

name: Foldable 4-in-1 Baby Stroller STI
description: Compact foldable 4-in-1 stroller for 0–36 months, available in green, pink and grey.

name: Luxury Baby Stroller S800
description: Premium high-landscape stroller with gold frame trim and large storage basket.

name: Katia-1 Baby Stroller
description: Bebesitos Katia-1 reversible 8-wheel stroller with canopy, footrest and carry bag, for 6–36 months.

name: Baby Stroller WH-500-102
description: Bebesitos 6-wheel stroller with reclining backrest, cup holder, and safety harness.

name: Spectrum Stroller Combo SPM-1000
description: Spectrum SPM-1000 stroller with infant car seat combo, reversible handle and 4 wheels.

name: Spectrum Stroller Combo SPM-1000-554
description: Spectrum SPM-1000-554 navy stroller and car seat combo with expandable canopy.

name: 3-in-1 Stroller Combo 747-9
description: 3-in-1 stroller combo with pram bassinet and infant car seat, gold frame edition.

name: 3-in-1 Stroller Combo 747-9 (Black)
description: 3-in-1 stroller combo in all-black with gold trim, includes bassinet and car seat.
